note: This video is an educational tutorial demonstrating multiple suturing techniques (Simple Suture, Simple Buried Suture, Vertical Mattress, Horizontal Mattress, Figure-of-8, Simple Running, Simple Running Locking, Subcuticular Closure, Complex Deep Wound Closure, and Skin Stapling & Removal) on a training model. It is NOT a performance of a single FLS task and therefore is NOT scored per FLS rubric.
video_type_rationale: The video contains a menu system on the right side with technique names highlighted in sequence, showing different suturing methods being demonstrated on a trainer pad. This is clearly instructional/educational content with multiple techniques shown sequentially, not a single FLS task performance.
